statement.headerDoc:
CollatzRei.DFUMT8Quantum — Lean 4 formalisation of D-FUMT₈ quantum operators.

  Companion to scripts/quantum/dfumt8_unitary_phase1.py (Aer simulator) and
  data/verilog/dfumt8_alu.v (Tang Nano 9K FPGA, 37 LUT4).

  This file proves: D-FUMT₈ NOT is an involution on Fin 8.
  Corollary: the associated 8×8 permutation matrix is its own inverse,
  hence unitary (permutation matrices over ℝ satisfy P† = Pᵀ = P⁻¹).

  Truth-table source: data/verilog/dfumt8_alu.v (case OP_NOT)
    FALSE(0)    ↔ TRUE(1)
    NEITHER(2)  fixed (self-dual)
    BOTH(3)     fixed (self-dual)
    ZERO(4)     ↔ INFINITY(7)

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: Zero-sorry verified by lake env lean
